name: Dover AFB
profile: Military-friendly Dover AFB housing snapshot anchored to Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Kent County, built for PCSUnited base-level market overviews.

market_metrics.market_type_summary: Stable Mid-Atlantic military market with limited rental depth and moderate buyer competition

mortgage_assumptions.defaults_note: Based on March 2026 Delaware VA loan planning assumptions.

notes: Delaware property taxes are comparatively manageable, but insurance, utilities, HOA exposure, and limited rental alternatives should still be included in all-in cost comparisons.
Dover-area rental supply can be tight, especially for family-size single-family homes near base.
Buyers should compare Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Milford by commute, schools, property condition, and long-term resale logic.

avg_home_mortgage_monthly.notes: VA loan planning estimate for practical Dover AFB / Kent County-area housing.

crime_status.installation: Extremely safe; gated military installation with controlled access.
crime_status.metro_dover_kent_county: Dover and Kent County vary by neighborhood. Military families should evaluate safety, schools, property condition, and commute at the address level, especially when comparing Dover city pockets with Camden, Magnolia, Smyrna, and Milford.

school_quality.on_base: No full on-base K-12 school system should be assumed; families should verify current school options and attendance boundaries by exact housing address.
school_quality.off_base: School quality varies by district and exact address. Caesar Rodney, Smyrna, Lake Forest, and other Kent County districts should be compared carefully by property location.

rental_vacancy.notes: Rental inventory can be tight for family-size homes near Dover AFB, and several sources describe immediate Dover-area rentals as expensive relative to local income.

rental_metrics.notes: Planning estimate based on Dover Base Housing and Dover-area rental observations, with 3-bedroom rentals commonly observed around the $1,900-$2,200 range depending on month and source.

special_events: Dover AFB Thunder Over Dover Airshow

military_lifestyle_fit.description: Strong Air Mobility Command identity, manageable commute patterns, lower tax environment, and practical access to Delaware, Maryland, Philadelphia, Baltimore, and DC regional corridors.

financial_brief.affordability_summary: Dover can be workable for military buyers because taxes are manageable and commute patterns are easier than larger metros, but family-size rental supply and quality housing options can be competitive.
financial_brief.buyer_opportunity: Strongest for disciplined VA buyers comparing Dover, Camden, Magnolia, Smyrna, and Milford by all-in payment, schools, commute, and property condition.

market_bluf.bluf_summary: Dover gives military families a practical housing market with manageable taxes, steady demand, and low commute stress, but the best move depends on school zones, rental scarcity, property condition, and assignment length.

summary_points: Dover AFB sits inside a stable Kent County housing market with manageable commute patterns and practical military-family housing corridors.
Dover-area rental supply can be limited for family-size homes, making buying attractive for some qualified VA buyers.
Lower Delaware property taxes can help all-in affordability compared with higher-tax markets, but insurance, utilities, HOA, and maintenance still matter.
Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Milford may offer stronger family fit or value depending on commute tolerance and school priorities.
The best Dover housing decision balances BAH, school zones, property condition, commute, and expected assignment length.
opportunities: Lower property tax environment can improve ownership math.
Shorter commute patterns can improve daily quality of life.
Dover AFB provides stable military-connected housing demand.
Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Milford can offer practical alternatives to immediate Dover inventory.
VA buyers may find a strong balance of payment, commute, and resale if the property condition is clean.
risks: Family-size rental homes can be limited and competitive.
Dover city neighborhoods vary enough to require exact-address due diligence.
Older homes may need roof, HVAC, plumbing, drainage, or insulation review.
School quality and district fit should be verified before committing.
Short assignments may favor renting or on-base housing if resale timing is uncertain.
buyer_notes: Dover buyers should compare Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Milford by commute, schools, condition, and all-in payment.
Do not assume low property tax automatically makes a home affordable; include insurance, utilities, HOA, and maintenance.
Family-size rentals may be limited, so buying can make sense for stable households with a longer assignment window.
Property condition matters because some older inventory can create repair pressure.
This market rewards buyers who preserve residual income and choose strong resale corridors.
seller_notes: Sellers should position homes around commute, school-zone clarity, VA readiness, condition, and practical monthly value.
Move-in-ready homes near Dover AFB or strong Kent County corridors can appeal to military families.
Military buyers respond well to clear roof/HVAC information, clean inspections, and PCS-friendly timing.
Homes in strong family corridors should emphasize commute logic and low-maintenance ownership.
investor_angles: Military demand and limited family-size rental supply can support rental relevance near Dover AFB.
Cash flow may be more practical than in higher-cost Mid-Atlantic metros.
Investors should stress-test vacancy, maintenance, tenant turnover, insurance, and property condition.
Clean single-family homes in practical commute corridors may outperform cheaper but weaker-condition inventory.
buyer_guidance: Use all-in monthly cost as the primary decision filter.
Compare Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Milford by commute, school zone, safety, property condition, and resale appeal.
Verify roof, HVAC, insulation, drainage, and utility expectations before finalizing a purchase budget.
Avoid choosing solely by proximity to base if neighborhood, school, or property condition is weak.
Use PCSUnited calculators to compare rent, buy, residual income, commute risk, and assignment-length exposure.
seller_guidance: Price against current buyer payment sensitivity and local inventory.
Highlight commute logic, VA readiness, school-zone appeal, and low-maintenance condition.
Homes with updated roof, HVAC, windows, insulation, and clean inspection confidence should be positioned clearly.
Military buyers need practical value and confidence in monthly cost, not generic listing language.
landlord_notes: Military renter demand can support stable occupancy near Dover AFB.
Single-family rentals in good school and commute corridors may appeal to military families avoiding purchase risk.
Investors should model maintenance, vacancy, turnover, and utilities conservatively.
Clean, functional homes near base, services, and schools may outperform cheaper but weaker-condition inventory.

market.market_type_summary: Stable Dover / Kent County military market with limited rental depth and practical ownership potential

base_profile.market_label: Dover / Kent County Military Housing Market
base_profile.installation_type: Air Mobility / Strategic Airlift / Mortuary Affairs Support Base
base_profile.primary_mission_summary: Dover AFB is a major Air Mobility Command installation supporting strategic airlift, global mobility, C-5 and C-17 operations, aerial port capability, and the dignified transfer and mortuary affairs mission through the Dover Port Mortuary.
base_profile.pcs_personality: Stable, mobility-focused, family-relevant, lower-tax, commute-light, and strongly tied to Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, and Kent County housing decisions.
base_profile.base_bluf: Dover is not just a small-market PCS. It is a BAH, rental-supply, school-zone, property-condition, commute, and assignment-length decision. Lower taxes and manageable commute can help, but the best housing move still depends on exact neighborhood and all-in monthly cost.

user_positioning.military_family_bluf: Prioritize school-zone verification, commute simplicity, property condition, BAH fit, rental availability, and assignment length before signing a lease or purchase contract.
user_positioning.single_airman_bluf: Prioritize short commute, rental flexibility, roommate options, daily services, and avoiding unnecessary overbuying if the assignment timeline is short.
user_positioning.realtor_bluf: The strongest Dover housing conversations are about rental scarcity, VA-ready condition, school-zone confidence, commute simplicity, and low-tax ownership math.
user_positioning.investor_bluf: Rental demand near Dover AFB is influenced by military turnover, limited family-size rental inventory, state-government employment, healthcare, logistics, and regional commute patterns.

base_map_image.alt: PCSUnited public-facing Dover AFB placeholder orientation image for base housing and relocation planning.
base_map_image.title: Dover AFB Base & Housing Overview
base_map_image.caption: Placeholder PCSUnited orientation image until a dedicated Dover gate and neighborhood map is available.
base_map_image.safety_note: This is not an official DoD map. It is a placeholder PCSUnited orientation image and should not be used for access control, emergency routing, or official navigation.

visitor_control_center.name: Dover AFB Welcome and Visitor Center
visitor_control_center.hours: Commonly listed as Monday-Friday 6:00 a.m. to 5:45 p.m. and weekends 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.; verify current hours before travel
best_for: Family members without routine installation access
visitor_control_center.note: Use official Dover AFB visitor information before arrival. Access requirements, sponsor rules, gate procedures, and hours can change.

gates.name: Main Gate
gates.hours: Commonly listed as 24/7; verify official Dover AFB gate hours before travel
gates.commute_notes: Primary access point for many users approaching from Dover, Camden, Magnolia, or DE-1 corridors.
gates.user_warning: Verify current gate status with official Dover AFB sources before travel.

gates.name: South Commercial Gate
gates.hours: Commonly listed as 24/7; verify official Dover AFB commercial access procedures
gates.commute_notes: Useful for commercial or delivery planning and certain access patterns, but family commuters should verify whether it is appropriate for their situation.
gates.user_warning: Movers and commercial deliveries should verify procedures through official base access guidance.

major_services.name: Dover AFB Medical Clinic
major_services.address: Verify current clinic address before travel
major_services.phone: Verify through official TRICARE / Dover medical source
major_services.hours: Verify current clinic and pharmacy hours
major_services.user_note: Treat this as a major medical anchor for PCS planning. Verify emergency care options, pharmacy procedures, and clinic availability directly with official medical sources.

major_services.name: Dover AFB Commissary
major_services.address: Verify current commissary address before travel
major_services.phone: Verify current phone number with DeCA
major_services.user_note: Commissary access can materially affect monthly food budget for eligible users.

major_services.name: Dover AFB Exchange
major_services.address: Verify current Exchange location before travel
major_services.phone: Verify current phone number with AAFES
major_services.user_note: Important daily-life anchor for new arrivals, families, and permanent party.

major_services.name: Military Clothing Store
major_services.user_note: Useful for military-specific shopping needs after arrival.

major_services.name: Dover AFB Housing Management Office
major_services.address: Verify current housing office address before travel
major_services.email: Verify current housing office email through official sources
major_services.user_note: Dover AFB newcomer guidance instructs members to contact the Housing Management Office for housing-related questions, off-base referrals, and lease guidance before entering a lease or sales contract.

major_services.name: Hunt Military Communities / Eagle Heights Family Housing
major_services.address: Verify current leasing office address before travel
major_services.phone: Verify current leasing office phone number
major_services.email: Verify current leasing contact through housing provider
major_services.user_note: On-base housing can simplify commute and reduce rental-market friction, but families should compare BAH capture, waitlists, pet policies, and off-base alternatives.

major_services.name: Unaccompanied Housing Office
major_services.address: Verify current office location before travel
major_services.phone: Verify current phone number with official installation sources
major_services.email: Verify current email with official installation sources
major_services.user_note: Eligibility and availability should be verified directly with the housing office.

major_services.name: Bank / Credit Union / ATM Services
major_services.address: Verify current branch or ATM location before travel
major_services.user_note: Specific bank or credit union locations may change. Use current official branch locator or base directory before routing users.

major_services.name: Legal / Finance / Admin Services
major_services.address: Verify current office location before travel
major_services.user_note: Use this as a planning category in the Base tab; exact office routing should point to official base directory links.

major_services.name: Child / Youth / Family Support Services
major_services.address: Verify current CDC, youth center, and school liaison locations before travel
major_services.user_note: Critical for families. Exact program availability, waitlists, and eligibility should be verified with official Dover AFB resources.

on_base_housing.housing_type: Privatized and military housing support environment
on_base_housing.housing_office_address: Verify current housing office address before travel
on_base_housing.housing_office_email: Verify current housing office email through official sources
on_base_housing.privatized_housing_provider: Hunt Military Communities / Eagle Heights Family Housing
on_base_housing.map_zone: housing support area / Eagle Heights community
best_for: Families wanting to reduce rental-market uncertainty
Users who want predictable access to base services
watchouts: Availability and waitlists can change
On-base housing may capture BAH differently than off-base renting
Pet policies and breed restrictions should be verified
School assignment must be verified by exact address
Off-base rental supply may be limited for family-size homes
Longer assignment length may make buying more attractive if resale and condition are strong
on_base_housing.pcsu_strategy_note: Compare on-base housing against off-base rent and mortgage options. Around Dover, the best choice depends on rank, dependents, BAH, debt, commute tolerance, school priorities, rental availability, pet needs, and expected assignment length.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Camden
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Strong family-oriented option near Dover with practical commute, suburban feel, and access to Caesar Rodney-area school options.
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 10-20 minutes depending on exact address, gate, and traffic
likely_gate_logic: Other routes depending on duty location and current access rules
watchouts: Inventory can be competitive
School assignment should be verified by exact address
Prices may be higher than some Dover city pockets
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Strong first-look area for families who want proximity, suburban feel, and practical commute.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Smyrna
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Northern Kent County option with growing suburban appeal and access toward Wilmington/Philadelphia corridors, but commute is longer.
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 25-40+ minutes depending on exact address, route, and gate
watchouts: Longer commute than Dover/Camden/Magnolia
Newer homes may include HOA costs
Route reliability should be tested during report-time windows
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Good for families wanting suburban growth and regional access, as long as commute and payment stay controlled.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Magnolia
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Close, quieter option south of Dover with family appeal, practical commute, and more suburban-rural feel.
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 10-25 minutes depending on exact address, route, and gate
watchouts: Inventory may be limited
Some properties may have rural utilities or longer service access
School zones should be verified
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Strong family-value candidate for users who want short commute and quieter living.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Dover Practical Pockets
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Closest broad market to the base with services and short commute potential, but neighborhood, school, and property-condition screening are important.
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 5-20 minutes depending on exact address and gate
watchouts: Neighborhood safety varies by pocket
Older homes may require stronger inspection
School zones and resale appeal should be reviewed carefully
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Use Dover selectively. It can be practical and close, but the best choices require strong property and neighborhood due diligence.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Milford
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Southern Delaware option with growing housing appeal, broader inventory, and access toward beach corridors, but commute can be longer.
best_for: Users comfortable with a longer commute
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 30-45+ minutes depending on exact address, route, and gate
watchouts: Commute may become a quality-of-life factor
Beach-corridor demand can affect pricing
Route reliability should be tested
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Good alternative when inventory or lifestyle preference points south, but commute must be accepted upfront.

recommended_neighborhoods.name: Felton / Wyoming
recommended_neighborhoods.fit_summary: Small-town options near Dover with quieter feel and practical commute, often useful for families seeking space and affordability.
recommended_neighborhoods.commute_band: Approx. 15-30 minutes depending on exact address and gate
watchouts: Inventory may be limited
Some homes may be older or more rural
Utility and school-zone details should be verified
recommended_neighborhoods.pcsu_recommendation: Useful value corridors for users who want quieter living and manageable commute.

commute_intelligence.overall_commute_posture: Generally favorable compared with larger military metros because traffic is manageable and Dover-area corridors are compact.
primary_commute_risks: Choosing by lowest price instead of school, condition, and resale fit
Longer drives from Smyrna or Milford if route timing is underestimated
Seasonal beach-route traffic in some Delaware corridors
planning_guidance: Test the commute during the user’s expected report-time window.
Confirm which gate best supports the user’s duty location.
Compare Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, Milford, Felton, and Wyoming by route reliability, not just price.
Contact the Housing Management Office before signing leases or contracts when appropriate.
Use commute plus all-in housing cost as the core PCSUnited decision screen.
commute_intelligence.pcsu_bluf: Dover commute risk is usually manageable, but the right housing choice depends on schools, condition, rental scarcity, and whether the household wants immediate proximity or a better family corridor.

bah_market_reality.overall_position: Favorable for disciplined buyers, with rental-supply caution.
bah_market_reality.buying_power_summary: Dover offers workable buying power for many military households, especially because property taxes are manageable and commute patterns are less punishing than larger metros.
bah_market_reality.renting_summary: Renting can be challenging when family-size homes are limited or expensive relative to local income, but it remains practical for short assignments or users uncertain about the area.
bah_market_reality.pcsu_strategy_note: Dover should be modeled as a favorable ownership market for disciplined users, but PCSUnited should still test rank, BAH, debt, savings, credit score, family size, commute tolerance, school needs, and assignment length before recommending buy versus rent.

strengths: Practical family corridors in Camden, Magnolia, Smyrna, and Kent County
Regional access to Delaware beaches, Philadelphia, Baltimore, and DC corridors
watchouts: Family-size rental inventory can be limited
School assignments must be verified by exact address
Older homes may need roof/HVAC/insulation review
Some cheaper properties may have weaker resale or condition concerns
Short assignments require careful rent-versus-buy analysis
family_readiness.pcsu_family_bluf: Dover can be a strong family PCS location when the household chooses the right Kent County corridor, verifies schools, protects residual income, and avoids weak-condition properties.

arrival_checklist: Verify current gate hours and visitor access procedures through official Dover AFB sources.
Contact the Dover AFB Housing Management Office before entering a lease or sales contract when appropriate.
Confirm whether on-base housing or off-base housing better fits rank, dependents, BAH, pets, school needs, and expected assignment length.
Compare Dover, Camden, Smyrna, Magnolia, Milford, Felton, and Wyoming using commute, schools, safety, condition, and all-in monthly cost.
Check roof, HVAC, insulation, drainage, utilities, HOA, and insurance before finalizing a purchase budget.
Verify school zones by exact property address.
Use PCSUnited calculators to compare rent, buy, residual income, commute risk, and assignment-length exposure before committing.
pcs_watchouts: Do not assume rental supply will be easy for family-size homes.
Do not choose by distance alone; school zone, condition, and resale matter.
Do not ignore older-home maintenance risk.
Verify schools, taxes, insurance, HOA, and utilities before calling a home affordable.
Short assignments may favor renting or on-base housing if resale risk is high.
A low property tax environment still requires all-in payment discipline.

realtor_intelligence.best_client_positioning: Lead with rental-supply awareness, VA-ready condition, school-zone confidence, commute simplicity, and low-tax ownership math. Dover clients need practical, assignment-aware guidance.
buyer_consultation_angles: Rent versus buy based on assignment length
All-in payment including taxes, insurance, HOA, utilities, and maintenance
Dover versus Camden versus Smyrna versus Magnolia tradeoffs
Property condition and VA appraisal readiness
Future resale appeal to military buyers
realtor_intelligence.pcsu_realtor_bluf: A strong Dover realtor should sound like a military housing strategist, VA-condition filter, and assignment-length advisor — not just a local salesperson.

notes: Market and housing values are PCSUnited planning estimates and should be refreshed periodically.
Gate, visitor, service, medical, and housing office details should be verified against official installation sources before publication or use in routing.
Placeholder map image is used until a dedicated Dover base orientation map is created.
Dover-area rental data can swing month-to-month because available inventory is limited.

source_notes: Use official Dover AFB sources for gate hours, visitor control, newcomer guidance, and installation access.
Use official Air Force Housing, Military OneSource, Dover AFB Housing Management Office, and privatized housing sources for housing details.
Use DeCA, AAFES, and TRICARE sources for commissary, exchange, and medical details.
Use Zillow-style indexes, Realtor.com-style market data, local MLS, rental aggregators, HUD, and Census-style demographic sources for housing and market refreshes.
base_profile.disclaimer: PCSUnited base profiles are planning tools only. They are not official DoD, Air Force, installation, legal, financial, real estate, lending, insurance, school-zone, or navigation guidance. Users should verify gate access, housing rules, school zones, medical services, visitor procedures, market prices, insurance estimates, commute conditions, utility costs, and property condition through official and professional sources before making decisions.

All major PCSUnited fields included and adapted for Dover AFB.
Compatible with PCS Snapshot, Base Demographics Shell, Base SaaS, and TOR parsing.

Preserves duplicate median price aliases for median_list_price, median_sold_price, and median_sale_price.
